name: my-ai-kit-feedback
description: Draft privacy-conscious feedback issues for my-ai-kit plugin and skill behavior.

interface.shortDescription: Turn plugin dogfooding friction into a safe issue draft
interface.longDescription: My AI Kit Feedback helps users turn an explicitly reported plugin or skill problem into a privacy-conscious GitHub issue draft. It guides users to collect only relevant session evidence, summarize expected versus actual behavior, redact sensitive details, and optionally create an issue after explicit approval.
defaultPrompt: Use my-ai-kit-feedback to draft an issue about a plugin behavior problem
Use my-ai-kit-feedback to analyze these session snippets and prepare a GitHub issue
